chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-378 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.09.2025. Both Petitioners are present in-person. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G for the State. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w DSP Saeedabad Sarfraz Hussain & Inspector/SHO Nadir Ali from PS New Saeedabad. Mr. Badal Gahoti, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.5 to 8, which is taken on record. Through this petition, the petitioners seek legal protection. Petitioners submit that the official Respondents are harassing them on the behest of private Respondents and prayed for legal protection. Mr. Gahoti present on behalf of private respondents denied the allegations of Petitioners to have caused any sort of harassment to the Petitioners. He has further contended that in fact the sons of Petitioners are involved in murder case bearing crime No.60 of 2024 lodged by complainant / Respondent No.5 at PS New Saeedabad, District Matiari. Learned A.A.G files statements on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4. The police officials present in Court also deny having caused any harassment to the Petitioners; however, they submit that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners. They further submit that just to protect the sons involved in murder case the Petitioner No.1 has preferred the instant Petition. Learned Assistant Advocate General present in Court submits that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the Petitioners, as and when required.

They further submit that just to protect the sons involved in murder case the Petitioner No.1 has preferred the instant Petition. Learned Assistant Advocate General present in Court submits that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the Petitioners, as and when required. Page 2 of 2 Accordingly, the Petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the Petitioners. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect any criminal proceedings, if pending between the parties before the competent Courts of law. JUDGE Ali.
